entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: A region in Africa characterized by significant agricultural yield gaps

entities.name: YIELD GAPS
entities.description: The difference between potential crop yields and actual yields achieved by farmers

entities.name: MINERAL FERTILIZER
entities.description: Inorganic nutrients applied to soil to improve crop growth and yield

entities.name: N-BASED FERTILIZER
entities.description: Mineral fertilizers specifically providing nitrogen to crops

entities.name: FERTILIZER RESPONSE TRIALS
entities.description: Field experiments used to determine the effect of different fertilizer rates on crop yield

entities.name: SIMULATION MODELS
entities.description: Mathematical models used to predict crop responses to fertilizer application

entities.name: TOTAL COST OF FERTILIZER APPLICATION
entities.description: The sum of expenses including purchase, transportation, and labor for applying fertilizer

entities.name: INCREASED YIELDS
entities.description: The improvement in crop output resulting from inputs like fertilizer

entities.name: CROP PRICES
entities.description: The market value received by farmers for their harvested crops

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: The overall process of growing and harvesting crops

entities.name: RESOURCE-POOR SMALL-SCALE FARMERS
entities.description: Farmers with limited financial and material resources operating on a small scale
